commands.review_summary:
The PR adds data-handling policy conformance/docs and tightens Policy validation so unsupported policy sections and rule keys become invalid policy findings.

PR surface: Source +1083, Tests +577, Docs +50. Total +1710 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: policy check/doctor calls dataHandlingPolicyShapeFindings, while policy compare only calls policyContainerShapeFindings and metadata validation, so unsupported nested dataHandling keys can bypass compare. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
